.afk.description: Sets your status to 'Away From Keyboard' with an optional message

.hug.description: Sends a virtual hug to the mentioned user

.kiss.description: Sends a virtual kiss to the mentioned user

.lick.description: Sends a virtual lick to the mentioned user

.bite.description: Sends a virtual bite to the mentioned user

.slap.description: Sends a virtual slap to the mentioned user

.howtall.description: Generates a random height for the mentioned user

.hot.description: Generates a random 'hotness' level for the mentioned user

.bitches.description: Generates a random number of imaginary bitches for the mentioned user

.howcool.description: Generates a random 'coolness' level for the mentioned user

.roll.description: Rolls a virtual dice with the specified number of sides

.fuck.description: Sends a Fun message or action

.fatrate.description: Generates a random 'fatness' rating for the mentioned user

.8ball.description: Consults the mystical 8-ball for an answer to a yes/no question

.spit.description: Sends a virtual spit towards the mentioned user

.roast.description: Generates a random roast directed at the mentioned user

.truth.description: Asks the mentioned user to reveal a truth about themselves

.dare.description: Challenges the mentioned user to perform a dare

.wouldyourather.description: Presents a 'Would You Rather' question for the mentioned user to answer

.neverhaveiever.description: Starts a 'Never Have I Ever' game

.iq.description: Generates a random IQ score for the mentioned user

.pp.description: Generates a random length for the mentioned user's PP (Pee Pee)

.gay.description: Generates a random 'gayness' level for the mentioned user

.hug.description: Sends a virtual hug to the mentioned user

.addemoji.description: Adds a custom emoji to the server

.addmultiple.description: Adds multiple custom emojis to the server
